title: Customizable Totem Plushie
description: Easily change the totem of undying into a plushie of your Minecraft skin!
body:
Customizable Totem Plushie is a resource pack that allows you to turn the totem of undying into a plushie of your skin easily!\
This supports both wide and slim skins so don't worry about having to download a different version for different skins.\
Does not require OptiFine or anything other mods!\
The default totem skin is Steve, so you can use that if you want instead of your own.\
How to turn the totem into your own plushie:
1. Download the resource pack
1. Inside the resource pack folder, go to assets/minecraft/textures/item
1. Make sure you have a skin (you can get a skin from [Skindex](https://www.minecraftskins.com/) or [NameMC](https://namemc.com/) if you don't have a skin)
1. Delete the default Steve skin called steve (.png if you have file extensions enabled)
1. Drag your skin into the folder
1. Rename the skin to skin.png (Important: if you don't have file extensions enabled [​so you can't see things like .png, .zip etc.] then just rename it to skin, not skin.png)
1. Load the resource pack ingame, and you're done!

Enjoy!
